_note: A sample useChat() turn (Path-B / report). This file is a {_note, messages} WRAPPER, not a bare UIMessage[]. Text deltas and `tool-*` parts are STANDARD Vercel AI SDK v6 UIMessage parts — `type: 'tool-<name>'` with `state` and `input`/`output` (NOT the v4 `tool-invocation` shape); build the dock against useChat, not this literal. The custom contract is the `data-report-ready` part on the assistant message. The `tool-run_sql` output payload is illustrative — pin it to #80's tools.ts.
